intro.intro:
I'm Ddo-Daeri,
your new marketing coworker.
intro.promise: I will guide you through onboarding.

auth.title: Connect your account
auth.description: Sign in with email or Google to initialize your organization context.
auth.name: Name

urls.title: Enter your brand channel URLs
urls.description: Website and social links are optional. Enter what you have.

review.title: Preparing brand review
review.description: Website and Naver Blog crawl runs in background with best-effort status.

interview.title: 4-question interview
interview.description: Answer all 4 questions while crawl continues in the background.
interview.q1: Q1. How would you describe your current brand tone?
interview.q2: Q2. Who is your primary audience?
interview.q3: Q3. Any forbidden words or topics?
interview.q4: Q4. What are your key campaign seasons?

result.title: Result document preview
result.description: Generate synthesized profile from crawl output and interview answers.

folder.title: Set your marketing folder
folder.description: Ddo-Daeri watches this folder for project materials.

summary.title: You're ready
summary.description: Review synthesized profile and press Start to open dashboard runtime.

contextPanel.description: Context cards and mini-chat are now page-aware.

scheduler.title: Scheduler
scheduler.description: Calendar-first board for daily content management.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.description: Inbox approvals, session chat, and session rail in one surface.
workspace.inboxDescription: Approve or reject pending workflow items. Request revisions in chat.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Live runtime status, pending visibility, and indexed files.

campaignPlan.title: Campaign Plan Board
campaignPlan.description: Select a saved campaign from the list and review its detailed plan document.
campaignPlan.detailDescription: Click a campaign to view the full plan details.
campaignPlan.detailContentDescription: Review the selected campaign plan document.
campaignPlan.noDetail: No campaign detail document is available.
campaignPlan.dataAccessUnavailable: Campaign data is unavailable in the current runtime session.

settings.title: Workspace Settings
settings.description: Current organization, watch folder, language, and runtime status.

brandReview.title: Brand Review
brandReview.description: Read the latest review markdown from organization brand settings.
brandReview.empty: No review markdown is available yet.
brandReview.dataAccessUnavailable: Brand review data is unavailable in the current runtime session.

analytics.title: Performance
analytics.description: Enter performance metrics and use them to improve future AI output.

input.title: Enter Content Performance
input.description: Submit engagement metrics to improve future AI content planning.

emailAutomation.title: Email Automation
emailAutomation.description: Draft automation and audience flow placeholders for next delivery phases.
emailAutomation.sequenceDescription: Automated email step orchestration will be integrated in a later phase.
emailAutomation.audienceDescription: Segment targeting and eligibility logic will be integrated in a later phase.

agentWidget.title: Mini Agent Chat
agentWidget.description: Shared chat session with full Agent Chat page.
agentWidget.inputPlaceholder: Ask the agent from current page context...

sessionSelector.inputPlaceholder: Type a reply for the assistant...

legacy.readOnlyNotice: Legacy messages are read-only and excluded from normal session timelines.

campaignPlan.notificationReview: Review and approve it in Inbox.
campaignPlan.revisionViaChatHint: Need changes? Ask in chat with natural language.
campaignPlan.planFailed: Campaign plan generation failed. Please try again.
